creator: mike@skew.org
text:
Please update the 4Suite XML port (textproc/py-4suite-xml) to the
current release version by applying the patch below. There are
changes to the Makefile, distinfo, and pkg-plist.

If you just want to grab the new files instead of applying
a diff, they're at http://skew.org/~mike/tmp/py-4suite-xml/

Thanks!
